Test fixture for BraketIngest.parse_braket_devices

IonQ Forte-1 (US East): arn:aws:braket:us-east-1::device/qpu/ionq/Forte-1

IQM Garnet (EU North): arn:aws:braket:eu-north-1::device/qpu/iqm/Garnet

Rigetti Ankaa-3 (US West): arn:aws:braket:us-west-1::device/qpu/rigetti/Ankaa-3

Mentioned again: arn:aws:braket:us-east-1::device/qpu/ionq/Forte-1

SV1 simulator: arn:aws:braket:::device/quantum-simulator/amazon/sv1
